CompanyBranding.title: Company Branding
CompanyBranding.description: Stores the company's branding information for letterheads and general UI.

external_config.description: Optional dynamic Firebase configuration for companies with their own hosting.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's login account, now linked to a specific company.

companyId.description: The unique ID of the company this user belongs to.

/company_settings/{settingsId}.description: Stores company-wide settings and optional external hosting configurations.
